<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Harry Potter Character Galaxy — README</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel+Decorative:wght@400;700;900&family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700&family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --gold: #c9a84c;
  --gold-light: #e8c96e;
  --gold-dim: #7a621e;
  --black: #060608;
  --dark: #0d0d12;
  --dark2: #13131a;
  --dark3: #1a1a24;
  --white: #f0ead6;
  --text: #c8c0a8;
}
* { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
body { background:var(--black); color:var(--white); font-family:'EB Garamond',serif; font-size:17px; line-height:1.75; overflow-x:hidden; }
canvas#stars { position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; z-index:0; pointer-events:none; }
.content { position:relative; z-index:1; }

/* HERO */
.hero { min-height:100vh; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; padding:80px 40px 100px; }
.hero-badge { font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:4px; color:var(--gold); border:1px solid var(--gold-dim); padding:7px 22px; border-radius:30px; margin-bottom:40px; text-transform:uppercase; animation:fadeUp .8s ease both; }
.hero-title { font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif; font-size:clamp(38px,8vw,96px); font-weight:900; line-height:1.05; color:var(--white); text-shadow:0 0 80px rgba(201,168,76,.25); animation:fadeUp .8s .1s ease both; }
.hero-title span { color:var(--gold); display:block; }
.hero-sub { font-size:18px; color:var(--text); max-width:600px; margin:26px auto 38px; font-style:italic; animation:fadeUp .8s .2s ease both; }
.hero-sub strong { color:var(--white); font-style:normal; }
.badges { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; justify-content:center; margin-bottom:20px; animation:fadeUp .8s .3s ease both; }
.badge { font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:2px; padding:5px 16px; border-radius:4px; text-transform:uppercase; border:1px solid; }
.badge.v { background:rgba(255,255,255,.05); border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.2); color:#eee; }
.badge.fa { background:rgba(0,149,131,.1); border-color:rgba(0,149,131,.4); color:#00bf9a; }
.badge.re { background:rgba(97,218,251,.08); border-color:rgba(97,218,251,.3); color:#61dafb; }
.badge.th { background:rgba(255,255,255,.05); border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.2); color:#eee; }
.scroll-arrow { margin-top:60px; color:var(--gold-dim); font-size:22px; animation:bounce 2s infinite,fadeUp .8s .5s ease both; }
@keyframes bounce { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(8px)} }
@keyframes fadeUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }

/* DIVIDER */
.divider { width:120px; height:1px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent); margin:60px auto; }

/* SECTION */
.section { max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 40px 80px; }
.section-label { font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:5px; color:var(--gold-dim); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:10px; }
.section-title { font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:clamp(20px,3vw,30px); font-weight:700; color:var(--white); margin-bottom:28px; position:relative; display:inline-block; }
.section-title::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:-8px; left:0; width:48px; height:2px; background:var(--gold); }

/* SCREENSHOTS */
.ss-wrap { max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 40px 80px; }
.ss-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:14px; margin-top:32px; }
.ss-card { position:relative; border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.14); background:var(--dark2); transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s; cursor:default; }
.ss-card:hover { transform:translateY(-5px); border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.4); box-shadow:0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.55),0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,.1); }
.ss-card.full { grid-column:1/-1; }
.ss-card img { width:100%; display:block; object-fit:cover; }
.ss-caption { position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; padding:18px 22px; background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(6,6,8,.95) 0%,transparent 100%); }
.ss-caption h4 { font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:2px; color:var(--gold); text-transform:uppercase; }
.ss-caption p { font-size:13px; color:var(--text); margin-top:3px; }

/* QUOTE */
.quote { border-left:3px solid var(--gold); padding:18px 28px; margin:36px 0; background:rgba(201,168,76,.04); border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; }
.quote p { font-size:19px; font-style:italic; color:var(--gold-light); }
.quote cite { display:block; margin-top:8px; font-size:13px; color:var(--gold-dim); font-style:normal; font-family:'Cinzel',serif; letter-spacing:1px; }

/* FEATURES */
.feat-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(290px,1fr)); gap:18px; margin-top:32px; }
.feat-card { background:var(--dark2); border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.12); border-radius:12px; padding:28px; transition:border-color .3s,background .3s; }
.feat-card:hover { border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.3); background:var(--dark3); }
.feat-icon { font-size:26px; margin-bottom:14px; display:block; }
.feat-card h3 { font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:1.5px; color:var(--gold); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:10px; }
.feat-card p { font-size:15px; color:var(--text); line-height:1.7; }

/* TECH */
.tech-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:18px; margin-top:32px; }
.tech-block { background:var(--dark2); border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.12); border-radius:12px; padding:28px; }
.tech-block h3 { font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:3px; color:var(--gold); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:18px; padding-bottom:12px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15); }
.tech-item { display:flex; gap:12px; margin-bottom:14px; align-items:flex-start; }
.tdot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--gold); margin-top:8px; flex-shrink:0; }
.tech-item strong { color:var(--white); display:block; font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:1px; font-weight:600; }
.tech-item span { font-size:13px; color:var(--text); }

/* PIPELINE */
.pipeline { margin-top:32px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
.pipe-step { display:flex; gap:18px; position:relative; }
.pipe-step:not(:last-child)::after { content:''; position:absolute; left:18px; top:42px; width:2px; height:calc(100% - 10px); background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--gold-dim),transparent); }
.pipe-num { width:38px; height:38px; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid var(--gold-dim); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:13px; color:var(--gold); flex-shrink:0; background:var(--dark); }
.pipe-body { padding:6px 0 28px; }
.pipe-body h4 { font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:1.5px; color:var(--white); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:5px; }
.pipe-body p { font-size:14px; color:var(--text); }

/* CODE */
.code { background:var(--dark3); border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15); border-radius:10px; padding:22px 26px; margin:16px 0; font-family:'Courier New',monospace; font-size:13px; color:var(--text); overflow-x:auto; position:relative; }
.code-lbl { position:absolute; top:10px; right:14px; font-family:'Cinzel',serif; font-size:9px; letter-spacing:2px; color:var(--gold-dim); text-transform:uppercase; }
.cmd { color:var(--gold-light); }
.cmt { color:#444; }

/* FOOTER */
footer { text-align:center; padding:60px 40px; border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.1); }
footer .fl { font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif; font-size:22px; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:14px; }
footer p { font-size:13px; color:var(--gold-dim); font-family:'Cinzel',serif; letter-spacing:2px; }

@media(max-width:700px) {
  .ss-grid,.tech-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .ss-card.full { grid-column:1; }
  .hero-title { font-size:36px; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="stars"></canvas>
<div class="content">

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-badge">⚡ AI-Powered Wizarding Analytics · V1.0.4</div>
  <h1 class="hero-title">
    Harry Potter<br>
    <span>Character Galaxy</span>
  </h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">A high-dimensional journey through character relationships, mapped by <strong>NLP neural networks</strong> and visualized in a living 3D star-field.</p>
  <div class="badges">
    <span class="badge v">▲ Vercel</span>
    <span class="badge fa">⚡ FastAPI</span>
    <span class="badge re">⚛ React + Vite</span>
    <span class="badge th">◈ Three.js</span>
    <span class="badge v">🐍 Scikit-learn</span>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-arrow">↓</div>
</section>

<!-- SCREENSHOTS -->
<div class="ss-wrap">
  <p class="section-label">Live Interface</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">The Wizarding Galaxy in Action</h2>
  <div class="ss-grid">
    <!-- Full-width: Galaxy explorer -->
    <div class="ss-card full">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Galaxy Explorer — interactive 3D star map of HP characters" />
      <div class="ss-caption">
        <h4>🌌 Galaxy Explorer — 150+ Characters Analyzed</h4>
        <p>Gryffindor (red) & Slytherin (green) clusters · Avg similarity 0.89 · Left-click rotate · Right-click pan · Scroll zoom</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Neural Profile -->
    <div class="ss-card">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Neural Profile — Harry Potter character sidebar with semantic proximity" />
      <div class="ss-caption">
        <h4>🧠 Neural Profile Panel</h4>
        <p>Semantic proximity · Power / Loyalty / Empathy scores · TextBlob dialogue sentiment</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Landing Page -->
    <div class="ss-card">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Landing Page — Unveil the Wizarding Galaxy" />
      <div class="ss-caption">
        <h4>✨ Landing Page</h4>
        <p>Neural Similarity · Living Universe · Trait Mapping — three core pillars</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- OVERVIEW -->
<section class="section">
  <p class="section-label">About the Project</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Project Overview</h2>
  <p style="color:var(--text);max-width:780px;margin-top:20px;">
    <strong style="color:var(--white)">Harry Potter Character Galaxy</strong> is an immersive, AI-driven visualization platform that explores the intricate web of relationships in the wizarding world. By analyzing thousands of lines of character dialogues using state-of-the-art Natural Language Processing, the system maps characters into a dynamic 3D star-field where spatial distance represents semantic and emotional similarity.
  </p>
  <div class="quote">
    <p>"Words are, in my not-so-humble opinion, our most inexhaustible source of magic."</p>
    <cite>— Albus Dumbledore</cite>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FEATURES -->
<section class="section">
  <p class="section-label">What It Does</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Key Features</h2>
  <div class="feat-grid">
    <div class="feat-card">
      <span class="feat-icon">🌌</span>
      <h3>Interactive 3D Galaxy</h3>
      <p>Explore a living universe where characters are represented as glowing celestial nodes. Similar speaking styles and emotional arcs result in closer spatial proximity.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feat-card">
      <span class="feat-icon">🧠</span>
      <h3>Advanced NLP Engine</h3>
      <p>Deep analysis of vocabulary, sentence structure, and dialogue patterns using Sentence Transformers and OpenAI/Groq Embeddings converting text into 1536-dimensional vectors.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feat-card">
      <span class="feat-icon">🎭</span>
      <h3>Emotion & Trait Mapping</h3>
      <p>Characters are profiled on core traits — Power, Loyalty, and Empathy — derived from AI-driven analysis of their dialogue and narrative arcs.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feat-card">
      <span class="feat-icon">🔍</span>
      <h3>Real-Time Neural Search</h3>
      <p>Instantly locate any wizard or witch and see their nearest neighbors in the vector space, ranked by semantic proximity score.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feat-card">
      <span class="feat-icon">🛡️</span>
      <h3>House-Based Clustering</h3>
      <p>Visual grouping of characters by Hogwarts Houses powered by AI-driven semantic similarity — Gryffindor in red, Slytherin in green.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feat-card">
      <span class="feat-icon">💬</span>
      <h3>Dialogue Sentiment</h3>
      <p>Each character's dialogue is analyzed for sentiment polarity using TextBlob, revealing emotional tone — from Neutral/Balanced to strongly positive or negative.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TECH STACK -->
<section class="section">
  <p class="section-label">How It's Built</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Tech Stack</h2>
  <div class="tech-grid">
    <div class="tech-block">
      <h3>⚛ Frontend</h3>
      <div class="tech-item"><div class="tdot"></div><div><strong>React.js &amp; Vite</strong><span>Modern, high-performance web framework</span></div></div>
      <div class="tech-item"><div class="tdot"></div><div><strong>Three.js / React Three Fiber</strong><span>Immersive 3D graphics and animations</span></div></div>
      <div class="tech-item"><div class="tdot"></div><div><strong>Tailwind CSS 4</strong><span>Premium utility-first styling with custom magical theme</span></div></div>
      <div class="tech-item"><div class="tdot"></div><div><strong>Framer Motion</strong><span>Cinematic UI transitions and micro-animations</span></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="tech-block">
      <h3>🐍 Backend</h3>
      <div class="tech-item"><div class="tdot"></div><div><strong>FastAPI</strong><span>Ultra-fast Python web framework for character intelligence</span></div></div>
      <div class="tech-item"><div class="tdot"></div><div><strong>Scikit-learn</strong><span>Dimensionality reduction via t-SNE / UMAP and clustering</span></div></div>
      <div class="tech-item"><div class="tdot"></div><div><strong>Sentence Transformers</strong><span>Converts raw dialogue into high-dimensional vectors</span></div></div>
      <div class="tech-item"><div class="tdot"></div><div><strong>Vector DB Concept</strong><span>Spatial coordinate system for character similarity mapping</span></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PIPELINE -->
<section class="section">
  <p class="section-label">Under the Hood</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">NLP Methodology</h2>
  <div class="pipeline">
    <div class="pipe-step"><div class="pipe-num">1</div><div class="pipe-body"><h4>Dialogue Aggregation</h4><p>Consolidating raw character dialogue from scripts and books into a unified corpus.</p></div></div>
    <div class="pipe-step"><div class="pipe-num">2</div><div class="pipe-body"><h4>NLP Preprocessing</h4><p>Tokenization, stop-word removal, and linguistic feature extraction from each character's speech.</p></div></div>
    <div class="pipe-step"><div class="pipe-num">3</div><div class="pipe-body"><h4>Neural Encoding</h4><p>Converting text into 1536-dimensional vectors using Sentence Transformers / OpenAI embeddings.</p></div></div>
    <div class="pipe-step"><div class="pipe-num">4</div><div class="pipe-body"><h4>Similarity Matrix</h4><p>Computing cosine similarity across all character embeddings to build a full relationship graph.</p></div></div>
    <div class="pipe-step"><div class="pipe-num">5</div><div class="pipe-body"><h4>Spatial Reduction</h4><p>Using UMAP / t-SNE to compress 1536 dimensions into 3D coordinates preserving neighborhood structure.</p></div></div>
    <div class="pipe-step"><div class="pipe-num">6</div><div class="pipe-body"><h4>Visual Rendering</h4><p>Final 3D coordinates rendered into a real-time interactive Three.js scene with house-based coloring.</p></div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- INSTALL -->
<section class="section">
  <p class="section-label">Get Started</p>
  <h2 class="section-title">Installation &amp; Setup</h2>
  <p style="color:var(--text);margin-top:20px;">Prerequisites: <strong style="color:var(--white)">Node.js v18+</strong> · <strong style="color:var(--white)">Python 3.10+</strong> · <strong style="color:var(--white)">Git</strong></p>

  <div class="code" style="margin-top:24px;">
    <div class="code-lbl">bash</div>
    <span class="cmt"># 1. Clone the repository</span><br>
    <span class="cmd">git clone</span> https://github.com/khushalkks/Harry_Porter.git<br>
    <span class="cmd">cd</span> Harry_Porter
  </div>

  <div class="code">
    <div class="code-lbl">frontend</div>
    <span class="cmt"># 2. Start the frontend</span><br>
    <span class="cmd">cd</span> frontend<br>
    <span class="cmd">npm install</span><br>
    <span class="cmd">npm run dev</span>
  </div>

  <div class="code">
    <div class="code-lbl">backend</div>
    <span class="cmt"># 3. Start the backend</span><br>
    <span class="cmd">cd</span> ../backend<br>
    <span class="cmd">pip install</span> -r requirements.txt<br>
    <span class="cmd">python</span> app/main.py
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="fl">⚡ Galaxy</div>
  <p>Developed with Magic for the Wizarding World · MIT License</p>
  <p style="margin-top:10px;font-size:11px;opacity:.5;">github.com/khushalkks/Harry_Porter</p>
</footer>

</div><!-- /content -->

<script>
// ── Starfield ──
const canvas = document.getElementById('stars');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
let stars = [];

function resize() {
  canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}

function initStars() {
  stars = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < 280; i++) {
    stars.push({
      x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
      y: Math.random() * canvas.height,
      r: Math.random() * 1.4 + 0.2,
      o: Math.random(),
      s: Math.random() * 0.008 + 0.002,
      d: Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1
    });
  }
}

function drawStars() {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
  stars.forEach(s => {
    s.o += s.s * s.d;
    if (s.o > 1 || s.o < 0.1) s.d *= -1;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(s.x, s.y, s.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,240,200,${s.o})`;
    ctx.fill();
  });
  requestAnimationFrame(drawStars);
}

resize();
initStars();
drawStars();
window.addEventListener('resize', () => { resize(); initStars(); });

// ── Scroll reveal ──
const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if (e.isIntersecting) {
      e.target.style.animation = 'fadeUp .7s ease forwards';
      io.unobserve(e.target);
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });

document.querySelectorAll('.feat-card,.tech-block,.pipe-step,.ss-card,.code').forEach(el => {
  el.style.opacity = '0';
  io.observe(el);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
